comment: Backfilled escaped-defect history (4 quarters) reconstructed from TRITON with the v2 methodology (component + keyword exclusion + HZN/MIRA link attribution + severity weights). Past quarters are immutable, so this is a static artifact (not regenerated by the daily Action). tritonScore = 10 * normalCDF((weighted - 5)/4). 'delivered' = Done Story/User Story/Bug resolved in the quarter (clean denominator); 'density' = weighted / delivered * 100 (weighted escapes per 100 delivered), null when delivered = 0. Density is INFORMATIONAL ONLY — it does not affect the score (exposure normalization is OFF). FINDINGS: usable history is effectively Q1-2026 onward (QA team / TRITON tracking is new); mu=5 sits at the center of the 2026 distribution (median 4.5, mean 6.4); escaped volume is volatile quarter-over-quarter. DENSITY CAVEAT: per-project trend works for GenAI Lens, Mira Studio and Mobile, but Mira's delivery is not captured under MIRA Story/Bug (delivered ~= 0), so its density is undefined/extreme — Mira's denominator must be fixed before density is usable for it.

densityInfo.denominator: Done Story/User Story/Bug resolved in quarter

Q1-2026.note: delivery not captured under MIRA Story/Bug — density undefined
